Premium Epoxy Flooring for Minneapolis Homes

Transforming floors with durable, weather-resistant epoxy solutions. Built to withstand Minnesota's extreme winters and humid summers.

What We Do

SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Our Minneapolis Epoxy Legacy

Founded in 2012, Horizon Epoxy Flooring began with a mission to protect and beautify Twin Cities floors against harsh Midwestern weather.

We pioneered cold-climate epoxy formulations that resist cracking from freeze-thaw cycles, combining German chemical technology with local craftsmanship.

When we're not installing floors, you'll find our team volunteering at Habitat for Humanity builds or sponsoring youth hockey teams across Hennepin County.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Epoxy Flooring

Arctic-Grade Formulations

Specialized epoxy blends that stay flexible at -30°F to prevent winter cracking.

Historic Home Experts

Gentle techniques for preserving original floors in Craftsman and Victorian homes.

Stormproof Finishes

Slip-resistant textures that handle melted snow and summer humidity without degradation.

Basement Specialists

Moisture-blocking systems crucial for Minnesota's below-grade spaces.

Schedule Your Free Floor Assessment

Our Minneapolis-based team will evaluate your space and recommend the ideal solution for your home's needs.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-epo-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

After two winters, my old epoxy floor in Linden Hills was peeling from salt damage. Horizon installed their ArcticShield system right before the polar vortex hit - it's now survived -25°F mornings without a single crack. The blue metallic flakes make shoveling snow almost enjoyable!

James R. Garage Floor Epoxy
“

Our 1920s St. Paul basement used to flood every spring. Horizon's team not only coated the floor but installed a hidden perimeter drainage system. Now our historic home has a functional rec room that stays dry even during April thaws. Worth every penny.

Marta S. Basement Floor Coating
“

I run a yoga studio in Uptown and needed something durable yet beautiful. Horizon created a custom blend of lavender and silver flakes that cushions falls while being easy to sanitize. Clients constantly compliment how it sparkles under our pendant lights.

Devon W. Decorative Flake Flooring
“

Our Eden Prairie driveway had a 3" sinkhole from frost heave. Horizon's foam injection lifted it perfectly level in 90 minutes - no heavy equipment tearing up our landscaping. Two winters later, it hasn't budged despite the extreme temperature swings.

Lars N. Concrete Repair
“

As operations manager for a Plymouth industrial bakery, I worried about grease and constant washdowns destroying our floors. Horizon's chemical-resistant epoxy with slip-resistant texture has cut our mopping time in half while eliminating employee slips for 18 months running.

Tami K. Commercial Epoxy
“

The crew transformed our Maple Grove garage just before car season. They accommodated our collection of vintage Corvettes by working around lifts and cabinets. The black epoxy with red flakes makes oil drips easy to spot and clean - crucial for car shows.

Carlos M. Garage Floor Epoxy

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How does your epoxy handle Minnesota's temperature swings?
Our proprietary FlexTec formula contains polymer microspheres that expand/contract with temperature changes, preventing the cracking commonly seen with standard epoxies after just one winter.
Can you match my home's mid-century aesthetic?
Absolutely. We offer 60+ vintage-inspired color combinations and can recreate classic terrazzo patterns popular in 1950s Minneapolis ramblers.
Will salt from my tires damage the finish?
Not with our SaltShield topcoat technology - laboratory tested to resist calcium chloride damage at concentrations 5x higher than typical road treatment levels.
